title: DJ's Summer Pack
description: DataPack that brings new Summer Themed additions to Minecraft such as beautiful butterflies!
body:
My summer pack is a big new project that will be expanded on as time goes on, adding.. you guessed it, Summer Features!

It currently adds **muddy pigs**_(cold, warm and temperate)_, **butterflies**_(3 variants)_ and a cool **summer hat** that players and mobs can wear _with a simple right click._

For the most up to date info check the **_[changelog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/djs-summer-pack/changelog)_**.

Please be sure to use the **Resourcepack** for the same version as the datapack you chose!

Massive **Credit** to **_Animated Java Blueprint_** plugin for **_blockbench_** making animated entities so much easier!!
